use tracing::{debug_span, trace};

fn find_matches(data: &[u32], target: u32) -> Vec<usize> {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    // BAD: span constructed in tight loop
    for (i, &val) in data.iter().enumerate() {
        let span = debug_span!("check", index = i);
        let _enter = span.enter();
        if val == target {
            results.push(i);
        }
    }
    results
}
